query:
SELECT u.name as corretor, COUNT(c.id) as contratos, SUM(c.valorImovel) as vgv
FROM contratos c
JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
WHERE MONTH(c.createdAt) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND YEAR(c.createdAt) = YEAR(CURDATE())
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY contratos DESC, vgv DESC
LIMIT 15;
